scenarios.name: should allow explicit named return contract aliases
scenarios.given: a type alias that names a return contract directly

scenarios.name: should allow non-ReturnType generic references
scenarios.given: a type reference such as Promise<Result>

scenarios.name: should report the use of ReturnType<typeof fn>
scenarios.given: a type annotation using ReturnType<typeof someFunction>

scenarios.name: should report nested ReturnType usage
scenarios.given: a type annotation using nested ReturnType utility references

scenarios.name: should suggest explicit return annotations from same-file functions
scenarios.given: ReturnType<typeof createValue> where createValue is a same-file function with an explicit return annotation
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the ReturnType reference
scenarios.then: a noReturnType violation is reported with a suggestion to replace it with the explicit return annotation
